user.title: ASUSWRT Tracker
user.description: Track only the configured IP addresses from an ASUSWRT router over HTTP.

data_description.tracking_ips: IP addresses to create as device_tracker entities, one per line.
data_description.binary_sensor_ips: IP addresses to create as binary_sensor entities, one per line.
data_description.polling_interval: Polling interval in seconds. Default is 20 seconds.

error.invalid_ips: IPs must be valid IP addresses, one per line, and at least one IP is required.

init.title: ASUSWRT Tracker Options
init.description: Edit tracked IPs and polling interval. Entities for removed IPs are deleted after saving.

data_description.tracking_ips: IP addresses to create as device_tracker entities, one per line.
data_description.binary_sensor_ips: IP addresses to create as binary_sensor entities, one per line.

error.invalid_ips: IPs must be valid IP addresses, one per line, and at least one IP is required.
